content.full_text:
November 25, 1992

Fair Political Practices Commission
428 "J" Street, Suite 610
Sacramento, California 95804

Re: Opinion Regarding Conflict of Interest

Dear Commissioners:

I am requesting formal written advice pursuant to Government Code Section 83114(b) from the Fair Political Practices Commission regarding whether or not I might incur a conflict of interest in certain matters coming before the Coastal Commission. The facts and questions presented follow.

FACTS

I, Linda Moulton-Patterson, am a City Councilwoman in the City of Huntington Beach and an appointed California Coastal Commissioner. My husband, Jerry M. Patterson, is an equity partner in the law firm of Burke, Williams & Sorensen (hereinafter called "law firm"). The law firm represents several coastal cities as their city attorney. My husband has an ownership interest of less than five percent (5%) in the law firm.

QUESTIONS PRESENTED

Do I have a conflict of interest which would prohibit me from participation in a Coastal Commission decision in either of the following circumstances:

1. The City of Port Hueneme is the applicant for discretionary Coastal permits including a General Plan Amendment, zone changes and other related actions pertaining to a recreational vehicle resort, requiring action by the Coastal Commission. A partner in the law firm, who also has less than a five percent (5%) ownership

interest in the firm, serves as the contract city attorney, although Mr. Patterson (my husband) does not work in any capacity in the City of Port Hueneme.

2. A land developer is the applicant for a discretionary Coastal permit requiring action by the Coastal Commission. The coastal project which is the subject of the application is physically located in the City of Dana Point. The law firm serves as the contract city attorney for Dana Point, and Mr. Patterson is the city attorney. (The City Council of the City of Dana Point previously granted City approval to the applicant's project.)

May I please have your formal written response to these questions at your earliest opportunity? If you have any questions regarding same or need further information, please call either the undersigned at 714/969-2222 or my husband, Mr. Jerry Patterson, at 714/545-5559. Thank you for your prompt response in this matter.

Sincerely yours,

Linda Moulton-Patterson
California Coastal Commissioner
501 20th Street
Huntington Beach, CA 92648
